title: galaksia online
description:
🚀 JOIN THE GALAXIA ONLINE FLEET! / WISH-LIST NOW!Galaksia Online is officially in development! 🌌

We are building a living, breathing multiplayer space MMORPG where your choices, your custom ship builds, and your clan dynamics will continuously shape the universe.

• Continuous Evolution: Our network architecture is built for dynamic server-side updates, meaning new stellar sectors, high-tech weaponry, and intense PvE raid bosses like Knor Prime will be deployed regularly.

• Shape the Galaxy: Early supporters will directly influence future modular components for the Ship Factory and upcoming combat mechanics through community votes.

📢 Add to your Wishlist today and join our official Steam Community Group to secure your place in the upcoming Early Access launch! 🛸

Об игре

Short DescriptionGalaksia Online is an action-packed, 2D multiplayer space MMORPG that blends retro pixel art aesthetics with deep role-playing mechanics. Form alliances, design your spaceships block by block from scratch, mine rare cosmic ores, and dive into massive faction-based PvP battles or challenging PvE raid encounters in dangerous star sectors. With newly added dynamic visual effects, the Black Market, and an in-depth Smuggling/Bounty system, the universe is now more dangerous than ever!

🚀 CHOOSE YOUR ALLEGIANCE

The galaxy is divided between two massive corporate superpowers vying for interstellar dominance:

🔴 MoonRy C.O.S (MoonRy Corporation of Space): A militaristic corporation operating under the fierce light of red suns, specializing in aggressive and heavily armed assault ships. 
🟡 ELY Galactica A.C.O.S (ELY Galactica Alliance Corporation of Space): An alliance rising in the heart of golden nebulas, utilizing cutting-edge technologies to deploy high-speed, tactical fleets.

Choose your corporation, defend your corporate borders, and conquer the vast frontiers of space!

🛠️ UNLEASH YOUR CREATIVITY AT THE SHIP FACTORY

Step into the Ship Factory orbiting Sector 3 and build your dream spaceship from scratch! Using an advanced, modular grid editor; drag, drop, rotate, and mirror over 200 unique pixel art parts across Hull, Wing, and Weapon categories. Create a unique 256x256 ship design that reflects your playstyle and showcase your custom creation to every other pilot in the universe!

🔫 TACTICAL COMBAT & VAST ARSENAL

Engage enemy swarms and dangerous space entities using a dynamic target-locking system. Equip your ship slots with these devastating weapons:

⚡ Lasers & Dual/Triple/Quad Cannons: For relentless and rapid firepower. 
🚀 Guided Rocket Launchers & Cluster Missiles: To smoothly track moving targets. 
🔮 EMP Blasters, Heavy Plasma Cannons & Mine Deployers: To disable shields, inflict damage-over-time (DOT) burns with plasma, and trap space lanes with mines.

⚖️ BLACK MARKET & BOUNTY SYSTEM

Find randomly spawning Black Market ships in the dark corners of the universe and purchase illegal Phantom weapons, secret utility items (Fake ID Chip), or Exotic Matter with massive flash discounts ranging from 25% to 50%. But every illegal transaction comes at a price! 

🏰 BUILD, DEFEND, AND PLUNDER CLAN BASES

Form a clan with your corporate allies and build your persistent Clan Base in secure sectors.

Contribute and Upgrade: Donate credits or smelt weapons from your inventory into pure Scrap Metal to increase your base's maximum Hull Points (HP) and strengthen automated defense turrets. 
Automated Repair: Produce special Repair Droids to monitor your base's infrastructure and repair it instantly during sieges. 
Plunder the Enemy: Launch raids on rival corporate clan bases to crush their defenses; blow up their vaults to plunder their accumulated credits and cargo!

💀 ENDGAME PVE RAIDS & BOSS BATTLES

Hunt down rare cosmic bosses amidst dangerous anomalies. Coordinate with your clan to forge a Raid Key and infiltrate the hyper-void of deep sectors where legendary targets await:

Gargantuan Monsters: Face off against Phantom Bosses, massive Aliens, or the ultimate endgame encounter: Knor Prime. 
Master the Mechanics: Dodge flawless Danmaku (Bullet Hell) grids, evade Orbital Strikes, and coordinate strategies to physically block crystal lasers that heal the boss before it enters its enrage phase and wipes out your entire clan. Players with the highest damage contribution are rewarded with exclusive Phantom Equipment and Exotic Matter.

🌌 SECTOR EVENTS & PLAYER MARKET

Explore ever-changing space sectors subjected to unpredictable cosmic events. Dive into active Meteor Showers to mine Promethium, Endurium, Terbium, and rare Xenomite. Hunt down Armed Smuggler Convoys, ambush Pirate Raids, or harvest Dark Matter Rift anomalies. Bring your collected loot back to the safe zone to instantly trade with your corporate allies, list them on the player market, or unlock exclusive skins with your accumulated Crystals!

Core Features:

• True Multiplayer MMO Networking: Seamless and real-time server synchronization powered by an advanced WebSockets infrastructure. 
• Enhanced Visual Effects: Elongating exhaust flames that dynamically react to ship movement, exclusive red-blue strobe sirens for Galactic Police, and an enriched next-gen space atmosphere. 
• Deep Pilot Progression (RPG): Earn XP, level up, unlock achievements, collect unique titles, and allocate skill points to Damage, Hull, Speed, Shield Regeneration, or Critical Hit Chance. 
• Party Loot Sharing: Form a party with up to 4 allies to share combat XP and benefit from an automated Round-Robin fair loot system for collected cargo. 
• Bi-Weekly PvP Rankings: Climb the ranks in corporate wars to earn massive Crystal rewards distributed every two weeks.
description_short: Galaksia Online is an action-packed, 2D multiplayer space MMORPG blending retro pixel art aesthetics with mechanics. Forge alliances, custom-build your starships block by block, and engage in massive faction-based PvP wars or challenging PvE raid battles across dangerous stellar sectors.
